title: The SAA-C03 Exam: Format, Domains, and Strategy
description: How the exam is structured, what the four domains weigh, and the Well-Architected Framework that underpins nearly every question.

lessons.title: Exam Format and Scoring
objectives: Describe the exam's question count, time limit, and delivery
Tell multiple-choice from multiple-response and how each is scored
State the passing score and plan a sensible pace

lessons.title: The Four Domains and Their Weighting
objectives: Name the four exam domains and their weightings
Prioritise study time according to domain weight
Recognise that questions blend domains and ask for the best trade-off

lessons.title: The AWS Well-Architected Framework
objectives: Map the four exam domains to their pillars
Use recurring design principles (multi-AZ, decoupling, managed services) to choose the best answer
